demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult son present at the visit

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Son calling] Please help my dad — he suddenly dropped his coffee cup, the right side of his face has sagged, and now he can't get any words out that make sense. It happened out of nowhere about 45 minutes ago.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on all at once — his face drooped, his right side went weak, and his speech stopped making sense — and it's not getting better.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly, about 45 minutes ago — he dropped his coffee cup and it all started at once
symptom_narrative.character: the right side of his face is drooping, his right arm and leg have gone weak and floppy, and he's trying to talk but the words are slurred and don't make sense
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — he can't move his right side or speak properly at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the right side of his face and body, and his speech
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on all at once and hasn't eased at all
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: he seems very frustrated and upset that he can't talk; he's still awake and looking at me
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this has ever happened before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he can't stand or walk, can't use his right arm, and can't speak

past_medical_history.how_managed: he was on a blood thinner for it but stopped taking it a while ago

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a newer blood thinner (not warfarin) for his irregular heartbeat

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home; his adult son is with him and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: the right side of his face is drooping
his right arm is hanging limp and he can't lift it — he dropped his coffee cup when it started
he's trying to speak but the words are slurred and don't make sense
he's awake and alert and seems to understand simple things I say, but he can't get words out
